nodes.itemHTML: • ydl_api_ngstars27 - Simple youtube-dl REST API to launch downloads on a distant server. GPL-3.0 Python

• Accessibility Observatory - As part of the Access Across America series the Accessibility Observatory at UMN evaluates multiple modes of transportation accessibility in major U.S. metropolitan areas. Reports are published annually, and select data sets are available through the University of Minnesota's Digital Conservatory.

• BetterMouse - Smooth scroll, cursor acceleration prohibition, and powerful button/gesture remapping in one utility for 3rd-party mice. Aims for replacing those bulky and intrusive official drivers.

• DI-enginestars1.2k - DI-engine is a generalized Decision Intelligence engine. It supports most basic deep reinforcement learning (DRL) algorithms, such as DQN, PPO, SAC, and domain-specific algorithms like QMIX in multi-agent RL, GAIL in inverse RL, and RND in exploration problems.
• milvus – Milvus is open sourcestars13.9k vector database for production AI, written in Go and C++, scalable and blazing fast for billions of embedding vectors.
• Composer-Curl-Pluginstars4 - The plugin uses phpext_curl for downloading packages.
• Composer-Locatorstars59 - Provides a means of locating the installation path for a given Composer package name.
• Composer-Diffstars55 - Compares composer.lock changes and generates a Markdown report for usage in a pull request description.
• Composer-Substitution-Pluginstars49 - A Composer plugin replacing placeholders in the scripts section by dynamic values.
• Composer-REPLstars81 - The plugin provides the composer repl command, which gives you a PHP language shell (read-eval-print loop).
• Composer-Skrubstars87 - The plugin helps to remove junk from Composer installations and trim build sizes.
• Composer-Plugin-Exclude-Filesstars26 - A plugin for excluding files required by packages using the 'files' autoloading mechanism.
• https://github.com/slince/composer-registry-managerstars492 - The plugin helps you to switch between different composer repositories.

• Navitiastars380 is the opensource engine behind the Navitia.io live API.

• transit_modelstars37 - A Rust library to convert to/from the following formats: GTFS, NTFS (for Navitia, see Software for Creating APIs), TransXChange (UK standard format), KV1 (Netherland standard format) or NeTEx (European standard format).
• Notes on Vue - A personal guide to Vue development.

• Poke Genie - A free raid hosting and joining app for iOS & Android with PVP functionalities.

• osmcha - Detector for suspicious changesets. (Source Codestars98 / Wiki)
• achavi - Augmented change viewer. (Source Codestars37 / Wiki)
• Osm Change Viz - Changeset visualizer displaying information about added/modified/deleted elements in different panels.
• changeset-map - Map visualizing changes in selected changesets. Used in OsmCha. (Source Codestars31)
• OSM History Viewer - Changeset visualization. (Source Codestars7)
• Who did it? - Map highlighting recent edits per tile. Provides RSS feeds for watching changes in custom bounding boxes. (Source Codestars64 / Wiki)
• osm-livechanges - Near-real-time display of edits in the OpenStreetMap database. (Source Codestars28)
• PVPoke - A PVP ranking and moveset for Pokémon GO.
• Pokémon GO Calender - Pokémon GO calender events with Google Calendar and timezones support.

• Uptrace - Distributed Tracing Tool that helps developers pinpoint failures and find performance bottlenecks. Has a free plan, offers a free Personal subscription for open source projects, and has an open source version.

• UACstars265 - UAC (Unix-like Artifacts Collector) is a Live Response collection script for Incident Response that makes use of native binaries and tools to automate the collection of AIX, Android, ESXi, FreeBSD, Linux, macOS, NetBSD, NetScaler, OpenBSD and Solaris systems artifacts.
• Exploring human cognition using large image databases - Topics in Cognitive Sciences, 2016. [All Versions].
• AlgoWorld-Contractsstars29 - Collection of all smart contracts used by AlgoWorld, written in PyTeal.
• Algorand Discord - Official Algorand Discord server.
• Mailsystars17 - Quickly generate a disposable email.
• TemporaryEmail - Get a temporary email inbox.
• AWS Console Servicesstars281 - Quickly open up AWS Console Services in your browser or search for entities within them.
• caniuse.rsstars7 - Rust feature support and version info from caniuse.rs.
• PacMax – Pacmax was assembled as a way for Alfred lovers to find and share their favorite workflows, snippets, and themes.
• Timingstars25 - Interact with the Timing app.
• Bootstrap Iconsstars16 - Quickly look up Bootstrap Icons and add the desired one to your clipboard.
• Slackstars304 - Alfred workflow to interact, and perform various functions with the service Slack.

• Cal-ITP Operational Data Standard (ODS) - Intended to address the lack of a standard format for representing transit schedules used by drivers, dispatchers, and planners to carry out transit operations.
• Crabtyperstars180 - A speedtyping web app written in Rust.
• biratimestars2 - Based on the bira theme, but displays the date instead of the username in the prompt.
• omz-gitstars0 - Oh-My-ZSH's git plugin re-packaged to be standalone.
• silverstein-quotesstars0 - Show a random quote from a Silverstein song during shell startup.
• Configuration to use Hyper.js as a ZSH terminal with a Windows Subsystem Linux on windows 10, with Oh My Zsh and the Powerlevel10k themestars2 - How-to for getting Oh-My-ZSH running on WSL.
• A Generalized Algorithm for Multi-Objective Reinforcement Learning and Policy Adaptation - NIPS'19, 2019. [All Versions].
• Listmonk - High performance, self-hosted newsletter and mailing list manager with a modern dashboard. (Source Codestars8.7k) AGPL-3.0 Go
• Thingsboard - Open-source IoT Platform - Device management, data collection, processing and visualization. (Demo, Source Codestars12.5k) Apache-2.0 Java
• OTOBO - Flexible web-based ticketing system used for Customer Service, Help Desk, IT Service Management. (Demo, Source Codestars147) GPL-3.0 Perl
• Castopod - A podcast management hosting platform that includes the latest podcast 2.0 standards, an automated Fediverse feed, analytics, an embeddable player, and more. (Source Code) AGPL-3.0 PHP
• PHP SDKstars19 - PHP SDK to provide easy access to the Directus API.
• Teamhood - Free Project, Task and Issue tracking software. Supports Kanban with Swimlanes and full Scrum implementation. Has integrated time tracking. Free for 5 users and 3 project portfolios.
• Lucidchart - A online diagram tools with collaboration features. Free plan with 3 editable documents, 100 professional templates and basic collaboration features.
• Data Miner - A browser extension (Google Chrome, MS Edge) for data extraction from web pages CSV or Excel. The free plan gives you 500 pages/month.
